Frankestein Transformer
  • API Reference

  • Tormented BERT Frankestein
  • View page source

Tormented BERT Frankestein

TORMENTED-BERT-Frankenstein: The Ultimate Hybrid Transformer (SOTA 2026).

TORMENTED = **T**ernary **O**DE **R**etention **M**amba **E**xperts **N**eural **T**anh **E**ncoder **D**epth.

This module implements a mixed-architecture Transformer encoder/decoder that integrates 17+ attention mixer families, Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) FFN routing, BitNet b1.58 ternary weight quantization, factorized embeddings, looped depth for parameter-efficient recursion, Mixture-of-Depths token routing, and Engram conditional memory layers.

Core components:

  • UltraConfig — single-source-of-truth dataclass for all model hyperparameters.

  • TormentedBertFrankenstein — full hybrid encoder with looped depth, MoE, BitNet, factorized embeddings, and Mixture-of-Depths.

  • TormentedBertMini — simplified encoder variant preset for constrained GPU training.

  • FrankensteinDecoder — autoregressive causal decoder for LLM-style text generation.

  • HybridLayer — per-layer dispatcher that routes to the configured attention mixer and FFN (dense or MoE).

  • FactorizedEmbedding — reduced-dimension embedding with optional Conv1d pre-projection.

Supported attention mixer families (17+):

  • standard_attn — scaled dot-product self-attention.

  • sigmoid_attn — sigmoid-based linear attention.

  • retnet / retnet_attn — multi-scale retention.

  • ode — Neural ODE attention block (RK4 / Euler solvers).

  • titan_attn — Titan memory-augmented attention.

  • mamba — state-space model placeholder.

  • Sparse family (7 variants): sparse_transformer_attn, longformer_attn, bigbird_attn, sparsek_attn, nsa_attn, sparge_attn, fasa_attn.

  • Gated family (7 variants): gla_attn, deltanet_attn, gated_deltanet_attn, hgrn2_attn, fox_attn, gated_softmax_attn.

  • engram_attn — Engram conditional memory via scalable lookup.

Training-free policy: fasa_attn and sparge_attn raise a RuntimeError when called in training mode; they are eval/inference-only blocks.

Hardware Target: Dual Xeon E5-2680v4 + Nvidia Tesla P40 (24GB).

class src.model.tormented_bert_frankestein.FactorizedEmbedding(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any)[source]

Bases: Module

Factorized token embedding with optional Conv1d pre-projection.

Reduces the embedding lookup dimension to factorized_embedding_dim, then projects up to hidden_size via a linear (or BitLinear) layer. Optionally applies a 1D convolution over the embedding stream for local context smoothing before projection.

low_dim

Reduced embedding dimension.

use_conv

Whether the Conv1d pre-projection is active.

embedding

Token embedding lookup table.

conv

Optional Conv1d layer for local context smoothing.

proj

Linear (or BitLinear) projection from low_dim to hidden_size.

__init__(config: UltraConfig)[source]

Initialize factorized embedding from an UltraConfig.

Parameters:

config – Model configuration. Reads factorized_embedding_dim, vocab_size, use_embedding_conv, embedding_conv_kernel, use_bitnet, and hidden_size.

forward(input_ids: torch.Tensor) → torch.Tensor[source]

Embed token IDs and optionally apply Conv1d + projection.

Sequence length is forced to match input_ids after convolution to keep MLM labels aligned (even-kernel symmetric padding can shift length by +1).

Parameters:

input_ids – Integer token indices of shape (B, S).

Returns:

Tensor of shape (B, S, hidden_size).

class src.model.tormented_bert_frankestein.FrankensteinDecoder(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any)[source]

Bases: Module

Autoregressive causal decoder variant for LLM-style text generation.

Wraps a TormentedBertFrankenstein backbone with mode='decoder' so every attention layer applies causal (autoregressive) masking. Supports the same hybrid architecture features as the encoder: 17+ mixer families, MoE, BitNet, factorized embeddings, looped depth, Mixture-of-Depths, and Engram memory.

The model_class=frankesteindecoder preset forces mode=decoder at runtime, overriding any user-provided mode.

config

The UltraConfig (built from preset or user-provided).

backbone

The underlying TormentedBertFrankenstein model.

last_auxiliary_losses

Mirrored from the backbone after each forward pass.

last_mixture_of_depths_stats

Mirrored from the backbone after each forward pass.

__init__(config: UltraConfig | None = None)[source]

Initialize the decoder model.

Parameters:

config – Optional UltraConfig. If None, the default decoder preset is used. mode is forced to "decoder" if not already set.

static build_decoder_config(vocab_size: int = 50000, hidden_size: int = 2048, num_layers: int = 12, num_loops: int = 1, use_bitnet: bool = True, layer_pattern: List[str] | None = None) → UltraConfig[source]

Build the default decoder preset configuration.

Parameters:

  • vocab_size – Vocabulary size. Default: 50000.

  • hidden_size – Hidden state dimensionality. Default: 2048.

  • num_layers – Number of physical HybridLayer blocks. Default: 12.

  • num_loops – Number of loop iterations. Default: 1.

  • use_bitnet – Whether to use BitNet ternary quantization. Default: True.

  • layer_pattern – Optional custom layer pattern. If None, defaults to ["titan_attn", "retnet", "titan_attn", "mamba"] * 3.

Returns:

A pre-configured UltraConfig with mode='decoder'.

forward(input_ids: torch.Tensor) → torch.Tensor[source]

Forward pass through the decoder backbone (causal masking).

Parameters:

input_ids – Integer token indices of shape (B, S).

Returns:

Logits tensor of shape (B, S, vocab_size).

generate(input_ids: torch.Tensor, max_new_tokens: int = 128, temperature: float = 1.0, top_k: int = 50) → torch.Tensor

Autoregressive token generation with top-k sampling.

Runs the decoder forward pass repeatedly, sampling one token at a time from the top-k filtered softmax distribution. Runs under torch.inference_mode() for efficiency.

Parameters:

  • input_ids – Prompt token indices of shape (B, S_prompt).

  • max_new_tokens – Maximum number of tokens to generate. Default: 128.

  • temperature – Softmax temperature for sampling. Lower values make output more deterministic. Default: 1.0.

  • top_k – Number of highest-probability tokens to keep for sampling. Set to 0 to disable top-k filtering. Default: 50.

Returns:

Tensor of shape (B, S_prompt + max_new_tokens) containing the prompt followed by generated tokens.

class src.model.tormented_bert_frankestein.HybridLayer(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any)[source]

Bases: Module

Per-layer dispatcher: attention mixer + FFN (dense or MoE) + optional Mixture-of-Depths.

Each HybridLayer instantiates the attention mixer specified by layer_type, a normalization layer, and a feed-forward block. The FFN can be a standard dense MLP or a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) block with top-k expert routing. When use_mixture_of_depths is enabled, only the top-capacity tokens are passed through the full layer; remaining tokens are scattered back unchanged.

Training-free layers (fasa_attn, sparge_attn) raise a RuntimeError if called in training mode.

layer_type

The mixer type string (e.g. "retnet", "ode").

norm1

Pre-attention normalization layer.

norm2

Pre-FFN normalization layer.

mixer

The instantiated attention mixer module.

router

MoE router linear layer (None if dense FFN).

experts

ModuleList of MoE expert FFNs (None if dense FFN).

top_k

Number of experts activated per token in MoE mode.

ffn

Dense FFN sequential block (None if MoE mode).

depth_router

Mixture-of-Depths token router (None if disabled).

use_moe

Whether MoE FFN is active.

use_mixture_of_depths

Whether Mixture-of-Depths routing is active.

mixture_of_depths_capacity_ratio

Fraction of tokens selected.

mixture_of_depths_router_aux_loss_weight

Aux loss weight.

last_mixture_of_depths_aux_loss

Aux loss from the most recent forward pass (None if MoD disabled).

last_mixture_of_depths_selected_fraction

Fraction of tokens selected in the most recent forward pass.

last_mixture_of_depths_capacity

Token capacity used in the most recent forward pass.

TRAINING_FREE_LAYERS = {'fasa_attn', 'sparge_attn'}
__init__(config, layer_type)[source]

Initialize a hybrid layer for the given mixer type.

Parameters:

  • config – UltraConfig instance with model hyperparameters.

  • layer_type – String identifying the attention mixer. Must be one of the keys in the internal mixer registry or "mamba".

Raises:

ValueError – If layer_type is not recognized.

forward(x, logical_layer_idx: int | None = None, input_ids: torch.Tensor | None = None)[source]

Forward pass with optional Mixture-of-Depths token routing.

When MoD is disabled, delegates directly to _forward_dense(). When MoD is enabled, computes per-token router scores, selects the top-capacity tokens, runs the dense path on those tokens only, and scatters the updated tokens back into the original sequence. An auxiliary load-balancing loss is computed and stored in last_mixture_of_depths_aux_loss.

Parameters:

  • x – Input tensor of shape (B, S, hidden_size).

  • logical_layer_idx – Global logical layer index (0-based across loops).

  • input_ids – Original token IDs, required by Engram layers.

Returns:

Output tensor of shape (B, S, hidden_size).

Raises:

ValueError – If MoD is active and the sequence length is 0.

class src.model.tormented_bert_frankestein.TormentedBertFrankenstein(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any)[source]

Bases: Module

TORMENTED-BERT-Frankenstein: Hybrid mixed-architecture Transformer encoder.

This is the flagship model. It stacks num_layers HybridLayer blocks, each configured by layer_pattern, and repeats the entire stack num_loops times (looped depth). The logical depth is num_layers * num_loops.

Key architectural features:

  • 17+ attention mixer families dispatched per-layer via HybridLayer.

  • Looped depth: the physical layer stack is iterated num_loops times, sharing parameters across loops for parameter-efficient deep computation.

  • Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) FFN: per-token top-k expert routing with weighted expert outputs.

  • BitNet b1.58: ternary weight quantization via BitLinear when use_bitnet is True.

  • Factorized embeddings: reduced-dimension embedding lookup + projection via FactorizedEmbedding.

  • Mixture-of-Depths: per-layer token routing where only the top-capacity tokens are updated; auxiliary load-balancing loss is accumulated and exposed via last_auxiliary_losses.

  • Normalization: layer_norm, dynamic_tanh (DyT), or derf (Dynamic Erf).

  • Positional encoding: RoPE or HoPE, applied inside attention mixers.

config

The UltraConfig used to build the model.

emb

Token embedding layer (FactorizedEmbedding or nn.Embedding).

dropout

Embedding dropout layer.

layers

ModuleList of num_layers HybridLayer blocks.

final_norm

Final normalization before the output head.

head

Output projection to vocabulary logits (Linear or BitLinear).

last_auxiliary_losses

Dict of auxiliary losses from the most recent forward pass (e.g. "mixture_of_depths_router_loss").

last_mixture_of_depths_stats

Dict of MoD statistics from the most recent forward pass ("average_selected_fraction", "raw_router_aux_loss").

__init__(config)[source]

Build the Frankenstein encoder from an UltraConfig.

Parameters:

config – UltraConfig instance with all model hyperparameters.

forward(input_ids)[source]

Run the full looped-depth encoder forward pass.

Iterates the physical layer stack num_loops times, tracking a global logical_layer_idx. Accumulates Mixture-of-Depths auxiliary losses across all layers and stores them in last_auxiliary_losses.

Parameters:

input_ids – Integer token indices of shape (B, S).

Returns:

Logits tensor of shape (B, S, vocab_size).

class src.model.tormented_bert_frankestein.TormentedBertMini(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any)[source]

Bases: Module

Simplified encoder variant preset for stable training on constrained GPUs.

Wraps a TormentedBertFrankenstein backbone with a compact preset configuration: hidden_size=384, num_layers=6, num_loops=2, num_heads=6, num_experts=4, norm_type="derf", use_factorized_embedding=True, and a stable layer pattern of ["retnet", "titan_attn", "retnet", "mamba", "titan_attn", "ode"].

Factorized embeddings are forced on even if the provided config disables them.

config

The UltraConfig (built from preset or user-provided).

backbone

The underlying TormentedBertFrankenstein model.

last_auxiliary_losses

Mirrored from the backbone after each forward pass.

last_mixture_of_depths_stats

Mirrored from the backbone after each forward pass.

__init__(config: UltraConfig | None = None)[source]

Initialize the Mini model.

Parameters:

config – Optional UltraConfig. If None, the default Mini preset is used. Factorized embeddings are forced on.

static build_mini_config(vocab_size: int = 50000, use_bitnet: bool = True) → UltraConfig[source]

Build the default Mini preset configuration.

Parameters:

  • vocab_size – Vocabulary size. Default: 50000.

  • use_bitnet – Whether to use BitNet ternary quantization. Default: True.

Returns:

A pre-configured UltraConfig with compact dimensions.

forward(input_ids: torch.Tensor) → torch.Tensor[source]

Forward pass through the Mini backbone.

Parameters:

input_ids – Integer token indices of shape (B, S).

Returns:

Logits tensor of shape (B, S, vocab_size).

class src.model.tormented_bert_frankestein.UltraConfig(vocab_size: int = 50000, hidden_size: int = 2048, num_layers: int = 12, num_loops: int = 2, layer_pattern: ~typing.List[str] = <factory>, ode_solver: str = 'rk4', ode_steps: int = 2, retention_heads: int = 8, num_heads: int = 16, num_experts: int = 8, top_k_experts: int = 2, dropout: float = 0.1, use_bitnet: bool = True, norm_type: str = 'dynamic_tanh', use_factorized_embedding: bool = False, factorized_embedding_dim: int = 128, use_embedding_conv: bool = True, hope_base: float = 10000.0, hope_damping: float = 0.01, rope_base: float = 10000.0, rope_scaling: float = 1.0, use_hope: bool = True, positional_encoding: str | None = None, use_moe: bool = True, use_mixture_of_depths: bool = False, mixture_of_depths_capacity_ratio: float = 0.5, mixture_of_depths_router_aux_loss_weight: float = 0.0, ffn_hidden_size: int | None = None, ffn_activation: str = 'silu', embedding_conv_kernel: int = 3, mode: str = 'encoder', engram_max_ngram_size: int = 3, engram_n_heads_per_ngram: int = 4, engram_embed_dim_per_head: int = 32, engram_kernel_size: int = 4, engram_seed: int = 42)[source]

Bases: object

Single-source-of-truth configuration for all Frankenstein model variants.

Every hyperparameter lives here. The schema is validated in __post_init__ and enforced by configs/schema.yaml for YAML-based training configs.

vocab_size

Vocabulary size for token embeddings. Default: 50000.

Type:

int

hidden_size

Dimensionality of hidden states throughout the model. Must be divisible by num_heads. Default: 2048.

Type:

int

num_layers

Number of physical HybridLayer blocks in the stack. Default: 12.

Type:

int

num_loops

Number of times the layer stack is repeated (looped depth). Logical depth = num_layers * num_loops. Default: 2.

Type:

int

layer_pattern

Ordered list of mixer types assigned to each physical layer. The pattern is cycled modulo its length when num_layers exceeds the pattern length. Supported values: "ode", "retnet", "retnet_attn", "titan_attn", "standard_attn", "sigmoid_attn", "mamba", "sparse_transformer_attn", "longformer_attn", "bigbird_attn", "sparsek_attn", "nsa_attn", "sparge_attn", "fasa_attn", "gla_attn", "deltanet_attn", "gated_deltanet_attn", "hgrn2_attn", "fox_attn", "gated_softmax_attn", "engram_attn". Default: ["retnet", "ode", "mamba", "titan_attn"] * 3.

Type:

List[str]

ode_solver

ODE solver for ode mixer layers. One of "rk4" (Runge-Kutta 4th order) or "euler". Default: "rk4".

Type:

str

ode_steps

Number of ODE integration steps per ode layer. Default: 2.

Type:

int

retention_heads

Number of retention heads for retnet / retnet_attn layers. Default: 8.

Type:

int

num_heads

Number of attention heads for standard / sparse / gated attention mixers. Default: 16.

Type:

int

num_experts

Total number of FFN experts when use_moe is True. Default: 8.

Type:

int

top_k_experts

Number of experts activated per token in MoE routing. Default: 2.

Type:

int

dropout

Dropout probability applied after embeddings and within attention layers. Default: 0.1.

Type:

float

use_bitnet

If True, replace all nn.Linear layers with BitLinear (ternary weight quantization, BitNet b1.58). Default: True.

Type:

bool

norm_type

Normalization layer type. One of "layer_norm", "dynamic_tanh" (DyT), or "derf" (Dynamic Erf). "rms_norm" is NOT valid. Default: "dynamic_tanh".

Type:

str

use_factorized_embedding

If True, use FactorizedEmbedding with reduced embedding dimension + projection. Default: False.

Type:

bool

factorized_embedding_dim

Embedding dimension when factorization is enabled. Default: 128.

Type:

int

use_embedding_conv

If True, apply a Conv1d over the factorized embedding stream before projection. Default: True.

Type:

bool

hope_base

Base frequency for HoPE (Hybrid Positional Encoding). Default: 10000.0.

Type:

float

hope_damping

Damping factor for HoPE high-frequency components. Default: 0.01.

Type:

float

rope_base

Base frequency for RoPE (Rotary Position Embedding). Default: 10000.0.

Type:

float

rope_scaling

Scaling factor applied to RoPE frequencies. Default: 1.0.

Type:

float

use_hope

Legacy toggle for HoPE. Automatically aligned with positional_encoding in __post_init__. Default: True.

Type:

bool

positional_encoding

Explicit positional encoding scheme. One of "hope" or "rope". If None, inferred from use_hope. Default: None.

Type:

str | None

use_moe

If True, replace the dense FFN with a Mixture-of-Experts FFN block. Default: True.

Type:

bool

use_mixture_of_depths

If True, apply per-layer token routing where only the top-capacity tokens are updated; remaining tokens are passed through unchanged. Default: False.

Type:

bool

mixture_of_depths_capacity_ratio

Fraction of tokens selected per layer when Mixture-of-Depths is active. Must be in (0, 1]. Default: 0.5.

Type:

float

mixture_of_depths_router_aux_loss_weight

Weight for the auxiliary load-balancing loss in Mixture-of-Depths routing. Must be >= 0. Default: 0.0.

Type:

float

ffn_hidden_size

Hidden size of the FFN intermediate layer. If None, defaults to hidden_size * 2. Default: None.

Type:

int | None

ffn_activation

FFN activation function. One of "silu" (SiLU / Swish) or "gelu" (GELU). Default: "silu".

Type:

str

embedding_conv_kernel

Kernel size for the embedding Conv1d when use_embedding_conv is True. Default: 3.

Type:

int

mode

Model mode. "encoder" for bidirectional (MLM) or "decoder" for autoregressive causal generation. The model_class=frankesteindecoder preset forces mode=decoder at runtime. Default: "encoder".

Type:

str

engram_max_ngram_size

Highest N-gram order for Engram memory layers (range 2..max). Default: 3.

Type:

int

engram_n_heads_per_ngram

Number of hash heads per N-gram order in Engram layers. Default: 4.

Type:

int

engram_embed_dim_per_head

Embedding dimension per Engram hash head. Default: 32.

Type:

int

engram_kernel_size

ShortConv kernel width for Engram layers. Default: 4.

Type:

int

engram_seed

RNG seed for Engram hash multipliers. Default: 42.

Type:

int

Raises:

  • ValueError – If positional_encoding is not "hope" or "rope".

  • ValueError – If mode is not "encoder" or "decoder".

  • ValueError – If mixture_of_depths_capacity_ratio is not in (0, 1].

  • ValueError – If mixture_of_depths_router_aux_loss_weight is < 0.

__post_init__()[source]

Validate and derive dependent configuration fields after dataclass init.

Derives ffn_hidden_size, positional_encoding, and aligns the legacy use_hope flag. Validates mode, positional_encoding, and Mixture-of-Depths parameter ranges.

Raises:

ValueError – If any field fails validation constraints.

dropout: float = 0.1
embedding_conv_kernel: int = 3
engram_embed_dim_per_head: int = 32
engram_kernel_size: int = 4
engram_max_ngram_size: int = 3
engram_n_heads_per_ngram: int = 4
engram_seed: int = 42
factorized_embedding_dim: int = 128
ffn_activation: str = 'silu'
ffn_hidden_size: int | None = None
hidden_size: int = 2048
hope_base: float = 10000.0
hope_damping: float = 0.01
layer_pattern: List[str]
mixture_of_depths_capacity_ratio: float = 0.5
mixture_of_depths_router_aux_loss_weight: float = 0.0
mode: str = 'encoder'
norm_type: str = 'dynamic_tanh'
num_experts: int = 8
num_heads: int = 16
num_layers: int = 12
num_loops: int = 2
ode_solver: str = 'rk4'
ode_steps: int = 2
positional_encoding: str | None = None
retention_heads: int = 8
rope_base: float = 10000.0
rope_scaling: float = 1.0
top_k_experts: int = 2
use_bitnet: bool = True
use_embedding_conv: bool = True
use_factorized_embedding: bool = False
use_hope: bool = True
use_mixture_of_depths: bool = False
use_moe: bool = True
vocab_size: int = 50000
